lex.quality/defs: {:main {:type "record", :key "tid", :record {:type "object", :required ["qualityId" "orderId" "result"], :properties {:qualityId {:type "string"}, :orderId {:type "string", :description "→ vehicleOrder"}, :result {:type "string", :description "pass|fail|rework"}, :defects {:type "array", :items {:type "string"}}, :inspectorDid {:type "string", :description "inspector signs own attestation, no platform key (G15)"}, :timestamp {:type "string", :format "datetime"}}}}}
